name: Bento Features
description: Bento box feature grid with varied card sizes. Hero feature card (large) with stats and supporting feature cards.

asymmetric-glow.description: Asymmetric bento with hero card spanning 2 rows on left, glass stat cards with colored glow on right (2 hero stats + secondary row), and simple feature row at bottom. Creates strong visual hierarchy through glow effects and card sizing.

heroStats.description: Primary stats displayed as glass cards with colored glow. Each needs: value, label, sub, color (hex)

secondaryStats.description: Secondary stats shown in a single collapsed row. Each needs: value, label

showFeatureRow.description: Whether to show the bottom features row

slots.hero-card: _lg:row[span_2] — Card spanning 2 rows with chip, heading, description, terminal
slots.hero-stats: _grid _gc2 _gap4 — 2 glass cards with colored glow borders
slots.secondary-stats: d-glass _p4 — collapsed row with dot separators

helpers.GlowStatCard: Glass card with colored border glow. Props: value, label, sub, color, glowIntensity. Style: box-shadow with color opacity, inset highlight
helpers.SecondaryStatsRow: Inline stats with dot separators. Props: stats[]. Centered, glass background

split-stats.description: DEPRECATED: Use asymmetric-glow instead. Simple hero left + stats right without glow effects.

slots.hero-card: Card with text chip (not badge), heading, description, terminal preview
slots.stats-grid: _grid _gc2 _gap8 — large numbers with color, label, and sub-text

code.example: // See asymmetric-glow for the recommended implementation

hero-stats.description: Large hero feature + stats row + supporting features

slots.hero-card: Large Card (span 2 cols) with feature title, description, and visual preview
slots.stats-row: 4-column grid of stat Cards (icon + value + label)

grid-only.description: Simple uniform grid of feature cards

slots.feature-cards: Uniform Card grid with icon, title, description
